title: select distinct + order by (asc) + limit yields reversely ordered result
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, name String, value Decimal(10, 2), created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'alpha', 10.50), (2, 'beta', 20.75), (3, 'gamma', 15.00);
SELECT DISTINCT name FROM test_table ORDER BY name ASC LIMIT 2;
SELECT DISTINCT name FROM test_table ORDER BY name DESC LIMIT 2;
SELECT DISTINCT name FROM test_table WHERE value > 15 ORDER BY name ASC LIMIT 1;
key_bug_features: select distinct with order by and limit
